---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? What is the current limitation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Skill/Agent Impact

Which skills or agents would this feature affect?

- [ ] New skill needed
- [ ] Modification to existing skill: ___
- [ ] Orchestrator change
- [ ] Infrastructure/CI change

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
